issue: Unreliable connection between Web UI and Local Print Agent due to aggressive polling and tight timeouts.

recommendations.description: The current Javascript implementation drops the connection if the agent takes more than 800ms to respond. Browsers and antivirus software often delay localhost requests. Furthermore, browser tab background throttling delays setInterval execution.

code_changes.implementation: Do not mark the agent as 'Offline' if the fetch fails while document.visibilityState === 'hidden'. Chrome aggressively pauses timers in background tabs, which forces false timeouts.

recommendations.description: For absolute rock-solid reliability, replace HTTP Polling with persistent WebSockets. This eliminates CORS preflight latency completely, removes the need for interval polling, and handles reconnections natively without spamming the network tab.
